subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Average time complexity of Merge Sort:
explanation: Merge Sort average: O(n log n).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Best case of Merge Sort:
explanation: Best case: O(n log n).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Worst case of Merge Sort:
explanation: Worst case: O(n log n).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Space complexity of Merge Sort:
explanation: Space: O(n).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Merge Sort is stable:
explanation: Stable — equal elements maintain relative order is preserved.

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Merge Sort is in-place:
explanation: Merge sort needs O(n) extra space.
